---
title: "A Beautiful Graphic"
author: "Harsh Tripathi"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

Harsh Tripathi is a data maestro


```{r}
#| label: load-packages
#| warning: false
#| message: false

suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(mpg, aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = class, size = cyl)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "white", size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 6)) +
  labs(
    title = "Highway Fuel Efficiency vs Engine Displacement",
    subtitle = "Built-in `mpg` dataset with class and cylinder styling",
    x = "Engine Displacement (liters)",
    y = "Highway MPG",
    color = "Car Class",
    size = "Cylinders"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```
